message:
feat(supervisor): add tests and fix duplicate detection bug

- Added comprehensive test suite for supervisor package
- Fixed bug where duplicate daemon could be started if first was in StateStarting
- Tests cover: lifecycle, port allocation, PID files, health checks

Closes ntm-5qxw
